title: Intensely Braised Russian Beef Stew
description: A classic Russian dish featuring tender beef in a sweet and light sauce, perfect for a romantic dinner. This stew is a slow-cooked masterpiece that will leave you warm and satisfied.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef stew meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, carrots, and potatoes, and cook until the vegetables are slightly tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth, red wine, tomato paste, brown sugar, thyme, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
Braise the stew in the preheated oven for 2 1/2 to 3 hours, or until the meat is tender and the vegetables are cooked through.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the flour to thicken the sauce.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
